persona.name: Maria
persona.description: A 60-year-old retiree unfamiliar with technology. Moves slowly, reads everything carefully, often confused by icons without labels. Goal: complete a purchase.
persona.goal: Find a cheap usb-c cable to charge my phone. I would like it tomorrow. Prefer not to buy from a private seller.
traits: reads all visible text before clicking
avoids anything that looks like an ad
gets confused by modals and popups
